assembly_context.name: FourAxisIndustrialArm_Assembly
assembly_context.summary: 创建一个工业风四轴机械臂装配体，包含底座、回转台、3个通用关节叉、2个通用连杆、3个销轴和1个夹爪。所有零件基于默认尺寸参数化建模，并通过同轴和重合配合进行装配。初始姿态为竖直向上伸展（修正：为避免奇异点，肩关节设为90度水平伸出，其余关节伸直）。
design_rules: Unit: mm for dimensions, convert to m for API calls if necessary.
Fillet R2 on all exposed sharp edges.
Clearance fit: Pin D18mm into Hole D20mm.

instances.name: Upper Arm Link
instances.placement_notes: Length 300mm. Connects Shoulder Fork to Elbow Fork. Horizontal orientation initially.

instances.name: Forearm Link
instances.placement_notes: Length 250mm. Connects Elbow Fork to Wrist Fork. Vertical orientation initially (aligned with global Z).

assembly_sequence: Mate inst_yaw_turntable to inst_base_plate (Face Coincident + Axis Concentric)
Mate inst_joint_fork_shoulder to inst_yaw_turntable (Face Coincident + Axis Concentric)
Mate inst_hollow_link_1 to inst_joint_fork_shoulder (Axis Concentric + Plane Coincident + Angle Constraint)
Mate inst_joint_fork_elbow to inst_hollow_link_1 (Axis Concentric + Plane Coincident + Angle Constraint)
Mate inst_hollow_link_2 to inst_joint_fork_elbow (Axis Concentric + Plane Coincident + Angle Constraint)
Mate inst_joint_fork_wrist to inst_hollow_link_2 (Axis Concentric + Plane Coincident + Angle Constraint)
Mate inst_simple_gripper to inst_joint_fork_wrist (Axis Concentric + Plane Coincident + Angle Constraint)

part.name: Hollow Link
part.shape: Rectangular beam with rounded ends. Width 30mm, Thickness 20mm. Ends have cylindrical bosses for hinge pins.
part.material_or_notes: Aluminum Alloy. Fillet R2 on edges. Chamfer C1 on end faces.

faces.name: mid_plane_xy
faces.purpose: Symmetry plane for centering in fork

axes.name: start_hinge_axis_y
axes.purpose: Axis for hinge pin at start end

axes.name: end_hinge_axis_y
axes.purpose: Axis for hinge pin at end end

assembly_relation_notes: Start Axis concentric with Previous Fork Hinge Axis.
End Axis concentric with Next Fork Hinge Axis.
Mid Plane coincident with Fork Mid Plane.
No face contact with Forks; positioned by pins and mid-plane.
standalone_modeling_instructions: Extrude along X to specified length (300mm or 250mm).
Add cylindrical bosses at both ends for hinges.
